overall.description: A player character rides a horse along a foggy mountain path at night, holding a torch to light the way. The footage is from a video game (Elden Ring), showing the character traversing from an open cliffside to a forested area with ancient stone ruins.

events.description: path curves gently to the right along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a narrow cliffside path, holding a torch to illuminate the foggy terrain ahead

entered.detail: steep drop-off into misty fog visible to the left of the path
narrow dirt trail winding along the mountainside
grass-covered slope rising to the right of the path
mountain peaks barely visible through the thick fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, foggy night with the camera following a torch-bearing rider on horseback along a narrow cliffside trail. To the left, a steep drop disappears into thick mist, while grassy slopes rise on the right. The path curves gently as the rider proceeds cautiously along the exposed mountain edge.

events.description: terrain changes from open cliffside to enclosed forested area with ancient ruins ahead

agents.ego_description: riding uphill toward stone ruins, navigating between trees and rocks while the torchlight reveals the path ahead

entered.detail: ancient stone building with crumbling walls situated on the hillside ahead
tall evergreen trees flanking the left side of the path
large boulders and rock formations lining the right edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the exposed cliff behind, the rider enters a more enclosed forested area with dense trees and rocky outcrops. Ancient stone ruins become visible ahead on the hillside, partially obscured by fog. The path continues ascending through the terrain, with the torch casting dynamic shadows on the surrounding vegetation and rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an exposed, misty cliffside into a dense, ruin-strewn forest under the cover of night. It begins by trailing a torch-bearing rider along a narrow mountain trail, where a steep drop disappears into thick fog on one side and grassy slopes rise on the other. As the rider proceeds cautiously along the curving edge, the open landscape gradually shifts into a more enclosed environment filled with dense trees and rocky outcrops. The scene then expands to reveal ancient stone ruins partially obscured by the mist on the ascending hillside, while the torchlight casts dynamic shadows across the surrounding vegetation.
